meta.name: Model Serving & Inference Engines Almanac Roster
meta.research_method: 8-facet wide exploration, 112+ independent searches, 8 parallel agents

tools.name: vLLM
tools.notes: 73.7K+ stars; PagedAttention; 200+ models; multi-GPU (NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, TPU)

tools.name: SGLang
tools.notes: ~20K+ stars; RadixAttention; 29% throughput advantage on RAG workloads

tools.name: TensorRT-LLM
tools.notes: NVIDIA-backed; highest throughput; 30-60% faster than vLLM on H100; per-model compile

tools.name: llama.cpp
tools.notes: 100K+ stars; GGUF format; Metal/CUDA/Vulkan/ROCm; ARM, Raspberry Pi, WASM

tools.name: NVIDIA Dynamo
tools.notes: GTC 2026; disaggregated serving; KV-aware routing; 7x Blackwell boost; replaces Triton

tools.name: KServe
tools.notes: CNCF Incubating; InferenceService CRD; scale-to-zero; canary; vLLM/TGI runtimes

tools.name: BentoML
tools.notes: Python-first packaging; BentoCloud hosted; multi-framework

tools.name: Ray Serve
tools.notes: Multi-model serving graphs; online RAG; integration with Ray training

tools.name: Ollama
tools.notes: 52M monthly downloads; on-premise; not for multi-tenant production (collapses under 5 concurrent)

tools.name: LMDeploy
tools.notes: Shanghai AI Lab; TurboMind C++/CUDA; 1.5x vLLM on AWQ/MXFP4; DeepSeek/Qwen/InternLM

tools.name: TGI (Text Generation Inference)
tools.notes: HuggingFace-backed; 800+ HF models; Rust HTTP server; maintenance mode as of late 2025

tools.name: DeepSpeed-MII
tools.notes: Microsoft Research; Blocked KV caching; Dynamic SplitFuse; 37,000+ models

tools.name: Aphrodite Engine
tools.notes: PygmalionAI; vLLM fork; broadest quantization (FP2-FP12, EXL2, GGUF); creative/roleplay

tools.name: MLX
tools.notes: Apple; 24,600+ stars; unified memory; 4,255+ HF models; Apple Silicon only

tools.name: ExLlamaV2
tools.notes: EXL2 quantization; 2-3x faster than GGUF on GPU; single-card focus

tools.name: CTranslate2
tools.notes: OpenNMT; fast inference for Transformer models; C++ backend; Python bindings

tools.name: TensorRT Edge-LLM
tools.notes: NVIDIA; C++ framework; EAGLE-3 speculative decoding; NVFP4; chunked prefill

tools.name: MindIE
tools.notes: Huawei Ascend NPU专用; 闭源商业

tools.name: RTP-LLM
tools.notes: Alibaba's internal serving engine; MoE and long-context optimizations

tools.name: NVIDIA Nim
tools.notes: Containerized product on TensorRT-LLM; NGC distribution

tools.name: Triton Inference Server
tools.notes: NVIDIA; multi-framework (LLM + CV + tabular); being displaced by Dynamo for LLMs

tools.name: Seldon Core v2
tools.notes: Multi-step pipelines; drift detection; MLServer multi-model per GPU

tools.name: llm-d
tools.notes: Community; multi-node, multi-GPU for 70B+; disaggregated serving; KV cache offloading

tools.name: KAITO
tools.notes: Microsoft; AKS, K8s; automates GPU pool provisioning, model deployment, inference serving

tools.name: Kueue
tools.notes: CNCF; multi-tenant GPU queueing; fair-share; preemption; GPU util 25-35% → 60-85%

tools.name: NVIDIA GPU Operator
tools.notes: Automates drivers, MIG, time-slicing, DCGM monitoring

tools.name: TorchServe
tools.notes: PyTorch/Amazon; PyTorch-native; less LLM-specific than vLLM

tools.name: TensorFlow Serving
tools.notes: Google; TensorFlow-native; legacy for LLM workloads

tools.name: Fireworks AI
tools.notes: Per-token; FireAttention sub-100ms TTFT; low latency

tools.name: Together AI
tools.notes: Per-token; broad model catalog; fine-tuned deployment; research focus

tools.name: Replicate
tools.notes: Per-second billing; simple API; Cog container format; higher effective cost at volume

tools.name: Modal
tools.notes: Per-GPU-second; fast cold starts; vLLM native; pay-per-second for spiky workloads

tools.name: Baseten
tools.notes: Free tier → Enterprise; multi-cloud capacity; TensorRT/SGLang/vLLM/TGI runtimes

tools.name: Deep Infra
tools.notes: Low-cost inference; integrates with Dynamo

tools.name: RunPod
tools.notes: $0.34-2.69/hr; Pods + Serverless + Community Cloud; 30+ regions; cost leader

tools.name: Lambda Labs
tools.notes: $3.78/hr H100 SXM; 99.9% SLA; 1-Click Clusters (16-2,000 GPUs); no egress fees

tools.name: Vast.ai
tools.notes: ~$0.90/hr H100 (interruptible); cheapest verified rates; 68+ GPU classes

tools.name: CoreWeave
tools.notes: K8s-native; multi-region; NVIDIA partner; dedicated infra

tools.name: Nebius
tools.notes: NVIDIA partner; Dynamo/TensorRT-LLM optimized

tools.name: Crusoe
tools.notes: Flared-gas powered data centers; NVIDIA partner

tools.name: GMI Cloud
tools.notes: H200 bare metal; 40% speed advantage over virtualized cloud

tools.name: LiteLLM
tools.notes: 18K+ stars; 100+ providers; OpenAI-compatible proxy; YC W23

tools.name: Portkey
tools.notes: 250+ models; 20-40ms latency; MCP Gateway; open source March 2026

tools.name: Bifrost
tools.notes: Go; ~11μs overhead; virtual keys; RBAC; SSO; vault integration; MCP tool filtering

tools.name: TensorZero
tools.notes: Rust; ~0.3ms; LLM gateway, observability, optimization, evaluations, experimentation

tools.name: ExecuTorch
tools.notes: Meta; 1.0 GA Oct 2025; 50KB footprint; 12+ hardware backends; billions of users

tools.name: MLC-LLM
tools.notes: On-device deployment; fragmented; Ollama emerged as winner in this niche
